description_for_human: D365 CRM account profiles, contacts, pipeline, deal tracking, compliance, revenue forecasting, and relationship intelligence

functions.name: show-crm-pipeline
functions.description: Display the Investment Pipeline dashboard from D365 CRM with funnel visualization, deal cards, and account breakdown.

stage.description: Optional pipeline stage filter (e.g. Qualify, Develop, Propose)

functions.name: show-crm-account
functions.description: Display a D365 CRM account profile card with company details, key contacts, opportunities, and recent activities.

functions.name: get-crm-account
functions.description: Get the D365 CRM account profile for a portfolio holding by ticker symbol.

functions.name: get-crm-contacts
functions.description: Get all CRM contacts for a portfolio company by ticker symbol.

functions.name: get-crm-pipeline
functions.description: Get the investment opportunity pipeline from D365 CRM as text data.

stage.description: Optional pipeline stage filter (e.g. Qualify, Develop, Propose)

functions.name: get-crm-opportunities
functions.description: Get CRM opportunities for a specific company by ticker symbol.

functions.name: get-deal-tracker
functions.description: Get the M&A and deal pipeline with compliance status, risk rating, and revenue forecast. Filter by deal type or stage.

dealType.description: Filter by deal type: M&A, Capital Raise, FX Hedging, Follow-on, Exit

stage.description: Filter by stage: Qualify, Develop, Propose, Close

functions.name: get-revenue-forecast
functions.description: Get pipeline-weighted revenue forecast broken down by stage and deal type.

functions.name: get-compliance-status
functions.description: Get all deals with compliance issues — Pending, Flagged, or Escalated.

functions.name: get-ic-calendar
functions.description: Get upcoming Investment Committee dates with deal summaries.

functions.name: update-deal-compliance
functions.description: Update the compliance status of a deal. Set to Approved, Flagged, or Escalated with notes.

ticker.description: Ticker symbol of the deal's company

tools.name: show-crm-account
tools.description: Display a CRM account profile card.

tools.name: get-crm-account
tools.description: Get CRM account data as text.

tools.name: get-crm-contacts
tools.description: Get CRM contacts for a company.

tools.name: get-deal-tracker
tools.description: Get M&A/deal pipeline with compliance, risk, and revenue data.

dealType.description: Filter: M&A, Capital Raise, FX Hedging, Follow-on, Exit

tools.name: get-revenue-forecast
tools.description: Get pipeline-weighted revenue forecast by stage and type.

tools.name: get-ic-calendar
tools.description: Get upcoming IC dates with deal summaries.
